text.title: Lock In Risk Scoring Rubric Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `content/01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf names either a concrete rule id or `skip-this-methodology` when the case is out of scope. Max depth = 2.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the input satisfy this methodology's preconditions (trigger present + named consumer + source-of-truth accessible)?

branch.question: Is the case in-scope for lock-in-risk-scoring-rubric (matches Applies-If, no Skip-If matches)?

conclusion.verdict: apply rule r1-bound-scope from content/01-core-rules.xml; run the procedure
skip-this-methodology: case is out of scope; do not produce an artefact
skip-this-methodology: preconditions not met; resolve inputs before re-running

text.example: Observable: preconditions == satisfied AND scope == in_scope → conclusion: r1-bound-scope → run the procedure in content/04-procedure.xml.
